ac_task_coverage.rationale: T-0050 redeploys the production container so the stale-image 404 is eliminated; T-0051 adds response.ok and content-type guards so any residual non-JSON response cannot cause a SyntaxError in loadPendingReviews.
T-0050 verifies GET /api/reviews returns HTTP 200 JSON when healthy; T-0051 ensures the client path also accepts a structured {success:false,error:...} response (not HTML) without a parse exception.
T-0051 implements defensive JSON parsing and surfaces structured errors via showToast; T-0053 records the verification that no SyntaxError is thrown.
T-0053 verifies the Pending Reviews panel renders each item with transaction summary, history category + confidence, AI category + confidence, recommended choice, and Accept/Reject actions.

dependency_analysis.T-0050 vs T-0051: Declared as parallel Phase 1 tasks. Logical because public/ is live-mounted; the UI change takes effect without an image rebuild.
dependency_analysis.T-0052 vs T-0051: T-0052 depends on T-0051 to ensure regression tests run after the UI change. It does not declare T-0050 as a dependency by design, but execution order places it in Phase 2 after both Phase 1 tasks are complete.
dependency_analysis.T-0053 vs T-0050/T-0051/T-0052: T-0053 correctly depends on all prior tasks so acceptance verification can only run after redeploy, UI hardening, and regression tests.

gaps.description: AC-4 verification task T-0053 has declared dependencies on T-0050, T-0051, and T-0052, but verifying panel rendering also requires real review data to be present in production Firefly. The sprint plan does not include a dedicated data-seeding task.
gaps.mitigation: Verification plan allows simulating a pending review or using evidence from the most recent UAT run if the production review queue is empty.

gaps.description: T-0052 dependency list only references T-0051. This is functionally correct because the regression suite can run on any healthy deployment, but it could be misinterpreted as allowing T-0052 to run before T-0050.
gaps.mitigation: sprints/S0009/summary.md already places T-0052 in Phase 2 after both T-0050 and T-0051. No execution blocker.

AC-1: Run T-0050 docker exec categorizer probe to /api/reviews; assert HTTP 200 JSON and no HTML 404.
Reload authenticated admin UI and confirm browser console shows no GET /api/reviews 404 (Not Found) and no SyntaxError from loadPendingReviews.
AC-2: Probe GET /api/reviews with curl or browser network tool.
Assert HTTP 200 JSON {success:true,reviews:[...]} on a healthy deployment.
If the endpoint fails for any reason, assert the body is a structured {success:false,error:'...'} object and not HTML.
AC-3: If the endpoint returns a structured {success:false,error:...}, confirm loadPendingReviews logs the error to console.error.
Confirm the UI displays showToast('Failed to load pending reviews', 'error') without throwing a JSON parse SyntaxError.
AC-4: With real review data present, load the Pending Reviews panel.
For each item, confirm transaction summary, history category + confidence, AI category + confidence, recommended choice, and visible Accept/Reject actions.
